name: Verified Reforestation (Gold Standard)
description: Forest restoration projects with third-party verification; durable carbon removal over decades.

name: Regenerative Agriculture / Soil Carbon
description: Improves soil health and sequesters carbon; co-benefits for food systems.

name: Renewable Energy (LECs / wind-solar)
description: Displaces fossil generation; lower cost per tonne, avoidance-based.

name: Methane Capture (landfill / digesters)
description: High immediate warming impact reduction; strong additionality in many regions.

name: Engineered Removal Pilot (DAC / biochar blend)
description: Durable removal; expensive but high permanence—good for residual emissions.

name: Clean Cookstoves (community health)
description: Reduces indoor air pollution and woodfuel emissions; strong social co-benefits.
